pr_title: [GPU] Support CPU pointers on remote tensor

failed_jobs.name: Pytorch Layer Tests / PyTorch Layer Tests

root_cause_summary: The actions/upload-artifact step for test-results-python-pytorch-layers completed validation (1 file found, name valid, root dir valid) but then terminated silently in under 1 second without uploading. No error message was logged. Pytest itself completed successfully with 16281 passed, 4 xpassed tests. This is the second CI Doctor investigation of the same workflow failure run.
notable_findings: 4 xpassed tests in pytorch_tests - tests previously expected to fail now pass (test_arange, test_einsum, test_atan2)
Artifact test-results-python-pytorch-layers is absent from the run artifacts list confirming upload failure
The upload action terminated after ~240ms consistent with a silent infrastructure abort
ci/gha_overall_status_windows failed only as a cascade from the PyTorch job failure
recommended_actions: Re-run the failed Pytorch Layer Tests job - the failure appears to be an infrastructure flake
Consider updating xfail markers for test_arange, test_einsum, test_atan2 tests that now pass
Monitor GitHub Actions artifact storage status at https://www.githubstatus.com/
